title: Applicability of competition law to State instrumentalities
description: The National Company Law Appellate Tribunal, New Delhi Bench, in Competition Appeal (AT) 4 of 2026, has passed an order dated 26.02.2026 (“order”) granting interim relief to Confederation of Real Estate Developers Association of India-NCR (“CREDAI NCR”). The NCLAT has stayed the order dated 16.12.2025 (“Impugned Order”) passed by the Competition Commission of India in Information Case No. 16 of 2025 filed by CREDAI NCR and directed that no coercive steps will be taken by the Department of Town a
